name: Fresh Corn & Tomato Stew
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped green onions, including green part
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables: Remove the corn kernels from the cobs and scrape off any remaining milk. Stem the tomatoes and cut them into small cubes. Rinse the okra and thinly slice it. Set aside.
2. In a heavy skillet, melt the butter over medium-high heat. Add the onions and garlic and sauté until wilted, about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add the corn, tomatoes, okra, and all remaining ingredients. Reduce heat to medium and cook, stirring frequently for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for an additional 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
